docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ALL RISK INSURANCE SERVICES, INC. ("AARIS, INC.") MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
JUN 11,2002 POS OSC IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SONIA WONG.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-12-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-16-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
